// swift-tools-version:5.10
import PackageDescription

let package = Package(
    name: "Demo",
    dependencies: [
        .package(url: "https://github.com/apple/swift-argument-parser.git", from: "1.3.0"),
        .package(name: "NIO", url: "https://github.com/apple/swift-nio.git", .exact("2.65.0")),
        .package(url: "https://github.com/apple/example-package.git", .upToNextMinor(from: "1.2.3")),
        .package(url: "https://example.com/private/package.git", branch: "main"),
        .package(path: "../LocalPackage")
    ]
)
